name: com.curviate/mcp
description: Thin stdio bridge to the hosted Curviate MCP endpoint: LinkedIn actions for AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: CURVIATE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Curviate API key, from app.curviate.com.

environmentVariables.name: CURVIATE_MCP_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the hosted MCP endpoint URL. Defaults to https://app.curviate.com/mcp.
